ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in (e.g., Midwest Division) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Western Conference) */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with these stats */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_loss_percentage" TEXT /* Winning percentage */,
  "games_behind" TEXT /* Games behind the division leader */,
  "points_scored_per_game" TEXT /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" TEXT /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "strength_of_schedule" TEXT /* Strength of schedule rating */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "playoff_win_loss_percentage" TEXT /* Playoff winning percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is part of */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., Forward, Guard) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, or championship) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Game attendance */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Game duration in minutes */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Midwest Division) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., Western Conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total career wins */,
  "career_losses" INTEGER /* Total career losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game they played in */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds secured by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" TEXT /* Time played by the player in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., league official, team manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
